title: solanum nigrum subsp. puniceum
intro: Solanum nigrum subsp. puniceum, also known as purple nightshade, is a subspecies of the Solanum nigrum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum subsp. puniceum include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of various health conditions, such as sore throats and respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions, and it can also be found in some commercial herbal supplements.
